# McDaniel Family Chiropractic

Muskogee's choice for natural, family-centered chiropractic care.

## Core Tagline
Restoring Health Naturally.

## About Dr. Brant McDaniel
- Logan College of Chiropractic Graduate
- 41 Years of Clinical Experience
- Specialized in ICPA Pediatric & Pregnancy Care

## Primary Services
- Spinal Adjustments
- Family Wellness (Infants to Seniors)
- Acute Pain Relief (Migraines, Back Pain)
- Pregnancy Specific Care

## Location & Contact
- Address: 3300 Chandler Rd, Muskogee, OK 74403
- Phone: 918-686-8676
- Hours: Mon-Fri 9-5

## Promotional Hook
$49 New Patient Special (Consultation, Exam, and First Adjustment).
